results.title: Document
results.notes: Gemini batch 3/5 hit copyright filter (finish_reason=4) but recovered; 4 chapters extracted.

results.error: Gemini vision analysis hung indefinitely after image compression (49 pages, 7 batches). No timeout in run_in_executor call. Killed after 15+ min. Document not stored.
results.notes: LibreOffice conversion worked (226993 bytes PDF, 49 pages). Gemini never emitted batch logs.

results.error: Gemini analysis hung after 96-page image compression. Also: initial upload attempted failed with detected:xlsx due to embedded spreadsheet in Content_Types.xml - fixed in format_detector.py (ppt/ directory check now takes precedence). Second attempt after fix correctly detected PPTX but Gemini still stalled after 15+ min.
results.notes: Format detector bug fixed: reordered checks to use directory structure before content-type string matching.
